LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_NoModuleDef: No circle module definition was supplied.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_NotAModule: {0} is not a valid circle module.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_NoSlot: No module slot exists on the {0}.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_SlotOccupied: The {0} already has a module installed.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_Busy: The circle cannot be modified during an active ritual.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_NoAvailableModules: No stabilizer modules were found on this map.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleFail_NoModuleThing: No valid stabilizer module is available for installation.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerPatternDetail_Open: No stabilizer lattice is installed. The circle relies on raw containment only.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerPatternDetail_Partia: Some routing is present, but the lattice is still open and bleeds pressure.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerPatternDetail_Paired: Opposing edges are synchronized. Strong value before the ring is fully completed.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerPatternDetail_FullRi: All four edge sockets are occupied. The circle holds pressure more evenly.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerPatternDetail_Symmet: Uniform full ring. Best anomaly shielding and the cleanest breach geometry.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleTooltip_Empty: {0}: empty socket. Install a stabilizer module to improve containment and reduce ritual pressure.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleModuleTooltip_Installed: {0}: {1} ({2}) Base containment: +{3}% Heat damping: -{4}% Residue suppression: -{5}%
